title: The Registry of Primordial Naming

features.name: first-utterance-chamber
features.desc-on-touch: where the first name was spoken; the archive has locked this in amber, and it is still vibrating.

features.name: naming-algorithm-visible
features.desc-on-touch: the process by which things learned to be called things; each layer of logic visible, as if names were built in stone.

features.name: resonance-mapping-wall
features.desc-on-touch: a poster left by an unknown archivist: 'The Karman Marriage: two bodies tuned to frequencies that should not harmonize.' Misfiled as local history.

features.name: name-return-pool
features.desc-on-touch: all names drain here eventually; they fall back into the pool where they were first named, and begin again.

features.name: index-that-knows-itself
features.desc-on-touch: a registry of registries; the archive has filed itself, and found that the first name and the current name are the same.

inscription: each name returns to the place it left; none of them are ever only themselves

exits.label: back to the archive of all the names that came after
toward the first name that was never spoken
where naming spreads outward into the archive
back through all the names to find the first
exits.to: NEW: back through all the names to find the first
